reference_goals: Pressure hull — cylinder/end cap geometry, wall thickness, material (6061/Ti)
Sealing — double O-ring grooves, face seal, radial seal, compression stop
Penetrators — cable gland, bulkhead connector, strain relief boot
Internal layout — slide tray/chassis, sensor mount, desiccant pocket
Optical/sensor window — front port, retaining ring, anti-rotation pins
External features — clamp cradle, anode pad, lifting eye, depth rating label
needed_metadata: BOM — hull tube material, end cap material, O-ring compound (Buna-N/Viton), connector type
Pressure rating — depth class, safety factor, proof test pressure
Assembly sequence — internal tray install, end cap torque, leak test
Corrosion protection — anodizing, sacrificial anode placement
needed_engineering_docs: Structural boundary — external pressure (hydrostatic), axial seal compression, bolt preload
Thermal boundary — internal heat dissipation, ambient sea temperature
Sealing analysis — O-ring compression ratio, extrusion gap, backup ring need
safety_boundary: Design reference only; no specific depth ratings for operational use.

crawl_targets.search: underwater housing pressure vessel ROV STEP
